title: Code and data for: Adaptive rewiring produces sharp finite-size bimodality in a conviction-weighted competitive network
description: Reference implementation, analysis pipeline, and per-figure backing data for the manuscript "Adaptive rewiring produces sharp finite-size bimodality in a conviction-weighted competitive network" by Evan W. Martin (manuscript under review). Includes the C simulators (fixed-lattice torus and adaptive-network torus_dyn), Python analysis and figure-generation scripts, run scripts for the compute pipelines, per-figure backing CSVs, and the LaTeX manuscript sources.
